sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side. excellent misc-category fit because very low downside with strong contextual upside makes it an ideal context-driven misc item. strong polyphenol reputation because the core appeal of green tea lives in its compounds and effects rather than classic nutrition composition. nearly zero-calorie daily use because a huge practical advantage in a category judged more by effect than macros.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side. taste can be a barrier because not everyone enjoys it enough to use consistently. quality varies by source because the practical value depends somewhat on the product. can be a bit fussier than grab-and-go drinks because a tiny practical downside, but not a serious one.
